# MonkeyTravel

> MonkeyTravel is a free AI-powered trip planner that generates personalized day-by-day travel itineraries with real venues, actual prices, and smart routing. Available in English, Spanish, and Italian. No signup required.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://monkeytravel.app): Free AI trip planner — enter a destination, get a personalized day-by-day itinerary in minutes
- [Free AI Trip Planner](https://monkeytravel.app/free-ai-trip-planner): Generate personalized itineraries with real venues and prices, 100% free, no credit card
- [AI Itinerary Generator](https://monkeytravel.app/ai-itinerary-generator): AI-powered day-by-day travel itinerary generator with Budget, Balanced, and Premium options
- [Group Trip Planner](https://monkeytravel.app/group-trip-planner): Plan group trips with AI — invite friends, vote on activities, reach consensus
- [Solo Trip Planner](https://monkeytravel.app/solo-trip-planner): AI itineraries for solo travelers with safety tips, social spots, and local experiences
- [Budget Trip Planner](https://monkeytravel.app/budget-trip-planner): AI trip planning optimized for budget travelers with real daily cost breakdowns
- [Family Trip Planner](https://monkeytravel.app/family-trip-planner): Family-friendly AI itineraries with kid-appropriate activities and logistics
- [Weekend Trip Planner](https://monkeytravel.app/weekend-trip-planner): AI-powered weekend getaway planning with 2-3 day optimized itineraries

## Blog — AI Travel Planning

- [Best AI Trip Planners 2026 Compared](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/best-ai-trip-planners-2026-compared): Honest comparison of 7 AI trip planning tools with real testing
- [AI Trip Planner vs Travel Agent](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/ai-trip-planner-vs-travel-agent): Side-by-side test of AI planner vs travel agent for the same trip
- [How AI is Changing Travel Planning](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/how-ai-is-changing-travel-planning): Overview of AI's impact on the travel planning industry in 2026
- [How to Plan a Trip with AI](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/how-to-plan-a-trip-with-ai): Step-by-step beginner's guide to AI trip planning
- [Can You Trust AI Travel Itineraries?](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/can-you-trust-ai-travel-itinerary): Honest assessment of AI itinerary accuracy and limitations

## Blog — Destination Itineraries

- [Seoul 5-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/seoul-5-day-itinerary): Day-by-day Seoul guide with K-beauty glow-cation, DMZ, real 2026 prices
- [Tokyo 4-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/tokyo-4-day-itinerary): Day-by-day Tokyo guide with real 2026 prices and transit tips

- [Bali 7-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/bali-7-day-itinerary): Week-long Bali itinerary covering Ubud, Seminyak, Canggu, and Nusa Penida
- [Bangkok 5-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/bangkok-5-day-itinerary): Day-by-day Bangkok guide with temples, street food, and markets
- [3-Day Paris Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/3-day-paris-itinerary): Optimized 3-day Paris guide with real prices
- [5-Day Italy Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/5-day-italy-itinerary): Rome, Florence, and Venice in 5 days
- [Istanbul 3-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/istanbul-3-day-itinerary): Day-by-day Istanbul guide
- [Lisbon 3-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/lisbon-3-day-itinerary): Day-by-day Lisbon guide with Sintra day trip
- [London 4-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/london-4-day-itinerary): Day-by-day London guide
- [New York 5-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/new-york-5-day-itinerary): Day-by-day NYC guide
- [Barcelona 3-Day Itinerary](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/barcelona-3-day-itinerary): Day-by-day Barcelona guide

- [Cheapest Destinations in Europe 2026](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/cheapest-destinations-in-europe): 15 European cities under €50/day with real prices
- [Cheapest Destinations in Asia 2026](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/cheapest-destinations-in-asia): 15 Asian destinations under $30/day with real prices

- [Italy on a Budget](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/how-to-plan-trip-to-italy-on-a-budget): How to plan a budget trip to Italy in 2026
- [Honeymoon on a Budget 2026](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/honeymoon-on-a-budget-2026): 10 affordable alternatives to overpriced honeymoon destinations

- [Best Honeymoon Destinations 2026](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/best-honeymoon-destinations-2026): 12 honeymoon destinations for every budget and style

- [Best Food Destinations 2026](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/best-food-destinations-2026): 12 culinary travel destinations worldwide
- [Best Wellness Retreats 2026](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/best-wellness-retreats-2026): 10 wellness retreats from yoga to burnout recovery
- [Sustainable Travel Guide 2026](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/sustainable-travel-guide-2026): 10 eco-tourism destinations leading the way
- [Best Places to See Northern Lights](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/best-places-to-see-northern-lights): 12 aurora borealis destinations with real costs and peak dates
- [Passport Power Index 2026](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/passport-power-index-2026): Henley & Arton rankings — strongest to weakest passports
- [Is It Safe to Travel to the US in 2026?](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/is-it-safe-to-travel-to-the-us-2026): ICE enforcement, travel advisories, border rights, LGBTQ+ safety, FIFA World Cup visa guide
- [International Travel Checklist](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/international-travel-checklist): Complete checklist organized by timeline
- [Group Trip Planning Guide](https://monkeytravel.app/blog/how-to-plan-a-group-trip): How to plan a group trip without the chaos
